calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2019 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2019 Set For Case Management Conference On May-01-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Hearing Of Defendants Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott Nelson, 310-977-6876 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Wayne Snodgradd, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-4700 of the Office of the City Attorney for Defendant DEPARTMENT OF HOMELESSNESS AND SUPPORTIVE HOUSING.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court informs the parties no opposition was filed and the Court did not receive any email contesting the tentative ruling. Plaintiff wishes case to be dismissed. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DEPARTMENT OF HOMELESSNESS AND SUPPORTIVE HOUSING and Randolph Quezada's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. GRANT. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Off Calendar Jul-12-2018 Set For Trial On Feb-04-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
